name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(plugin): serialize Bridge endpoints with explicit camelCase keys

GetBridgeableSessions/GetBridgeStatus/StartBridge were returning C# records
directly, which keep their literal PascalCase property names in JSON since
Jellyfin's controllers don't auto-camelCase (the existing /Token endpoint
already relies on spelling keys out manually for the same reason). The
injected JS read session.sessionId as camelCase, got undefined, and sent
the literal string undefined as the session id when starting a bridge.
Project onto anonymous objects with explicit camelCase keys instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
